channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
item.description: <![CDATA[‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?]]>

item.title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
